question: Are the director of film Move (1970) and the director of film Mediterranee (1963) from the same country?
ground_truth: No. Move (1970) was directed by Stuart Rosenberg (American, United States), while Mediterranee (1963) was directed by Jean-Daniel Pollet (French, France), so they are from different countries.

question: Who directed the 1970 American comedy film Move?
ground_truth: Stuart Rosenberg directed the 1970 film Move.

question: In which country was the director of the film Mediterranee (1963) born?
ground_truth: France. Mediterranee (1963) was directed by Jean-Daniel Pollet, who was born in La Madeleine, France.

ground_truth: American. Move (1970) was directed by Stuart Rosenberg, an American film and television director.

question: Which film was directed by Jean-Daniel Pollet, Move (1970) or Mediterranee (1963)?
ground_truth: Mediterranee (1963) was directed by Jean-Daniel Pollet.
